title: Starry's Randomized Moss
description: Makes the moss texture look less repetitive in large areas.
body:
A lightweight resource pack that adds random rotation to the moss texture in order to greatly reduce noticeable tiling. (Texture Pack Compatible!)

![before and after comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06ffcaf3020181274007eade06047b66d063e526.jpeg)
